Seat 1: Hero ($100.00 in chips)
Seat 2: bob_the_fish ($85.50 in chips)

Seat 5: emma_v ($210.00 in chips)
Seat 6: frank_tank ($98.00 in chips)

Dealt to Hero [7h 2s]
frank_tank: folds

dave42: folds
